message:
fix(content): address data-integrity and correctness issues across stores

Featured store (featured-store.ts):
- Change byResourceKey index from Map<string, string> to
  Map<string, Set<string>> so multiple featured items for the same
  resource are tracked correctly. The previous 1:1 mapping silently
  dropped earlier entries when a resource was featured more than once.
- getFeaturedByResource now iterates the full set of cached IDs and
  heals the index with all active items, not just the first.
- removeFeaturedContent deletes the item from the set instead of
  replacing the entire mapping, preserving sibling entries.

Share route (route.ts):
- Use request.nextUrl.origin instead of a hardcoded
  "https://jeffreysprompts.com" domain so share links work correctly
  in preview/staging deployments.
- Comment out the "collection" content-type mapping since no
  getCollection resolver exists yet, preventing a runtime error.

History client (client.ts):
- Fix unreachable-code bug in the crypto.randomUUID fallback: the else
  branch previously called crypto.randomUUID() again (which would fail
  since the if-condition already proved it was unavailable). Replace
  with crypto.getRandomValues + hex encoding as a true fallback.

Review store (review-store.ts):
- Make sanitizeUserInput idempotent by decoding existing HTML entities
  before re-encoding. Previously, editing a review multiple times would
  stack-encode entities (e.g. &amp;amp;).
- Remove the blanket "data:" protocol strip which was over-aggressive
  and could mangle legitimate text containing that substring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,25 +85,36 @@ const MAX_RESPONSE_LENGTH = 1000;
  * 4. Remove event handlers (onclick, onerror, etc.)
  */
 function sanitizeUserInput(input: string): string {
-  return (
-    input
-      // Remove script and style tags with content
-      .replace(/<script\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/script>)<[^<]*)*<\/script>/gi, "")
-      .replace(/<style\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/style>)<[^<]*)*<\/style>/gi, "")
-      // Remove all HTML tags
-      .replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "")
-      // Remove javascript: and data: URLs that might be in attributes
-      .replace(/javascript:/gi, "")
-      .replace(/data:/gi, "")
-      // Remove common event handlers patterns
-      .replace(/on\w+\s*=/gi, "")
-      // Encode remaining special characters
-      .replace(/&/g, "&")
-      .replace(/</g, "<")
-      .replace(/>/g, ">")
-      .replace(/"/g, """)
-      .replace(/'/g, "'")
-  );
+  let text = input;
+
+  // Remove script and style tags with content
+  text = text.replace(/<script\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/script>)<[^<]*)*<\/script>/gi, "");
+  text = text.replace(/<style\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/style>)<[^<]*)*<\/style>/gi, "");
+  // Remove all HTML tags
+  text = text.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "");
+  // Remove javascript: URLs (only in URL-like contexts, not bare text)
+  text = text.replace(/javascript:/gi, "");
+  // Remove common event handlers patterns
+  text = text.replace(/on\w+\s*=/gi, "");
+
+  // Decode any existing entities first to prevent double-encoding on re-edits,
+  // then re-encode. This makes sanitization idempotent.
+  text = text
+    .replace(/'/g, "'")
+    .replace(/"/g, '"')
+    .replace(/>/g, ">")
+    .replace(/</g, "<")
+    .replace(/&/g, "&");
+
+  // Encode special characters
+  text = text
+    .replace(/&/g, "&")
+    .replace(/</g, "<")
+    .replace(/>/g, ">")
+    .replace(/"/g, """)
+    .replace(/'/g, "'");
+
+  return text;
 }
 
 function getStore(): ReviewStore {
